# SteelR — Bespoke Steel Entrance Doors | United Kingdom

> SteelR is a UK manufacturer and installer of bespoke steel entrance doors for residential properties. Every door is individually designed, manufactured in our UK workshop, and professionally installed by our own fitting team — no subcontractors.

## What Makes SteelR Different

SteelR doors are engineered to SR3 security standards — the highest practical security rating for residential entrance doors under BS EN 1627:2011. Every door is ISO 9001 certified, Secured by Design approved by the UK police, and manufactured from fire-rated steel. Unlike composite or timber alternatives, steel entrance doors offer a 25+ year lifespan with virtually zero maintenance.

We are one of the few UK manufacturers offering a complete end-to-end service: design consultation, structural survey, bespoke manufacturing, and professional installation. There are no standard sizes and no off-the-shelf designs — every door is made to measure for the individual property.

## Products and Services

- Bespoke steel entrance doors — contemporary, traditional, and ornate styles
- Double steel entrance doors — for grand entrances and period properties
- Steel doors with sidelights and fanlights — for maximum natural light
- FD30 and FD60 fire rated steel doors — for flats, HMOs, new builds, and housing association properties
- PAS 24 certified doors — meeting Approved Document Q for new build compliance
- Over 200 RAL colour options with any hardware finish
- Full structural survey and professional installation included
- Nationwide UK delivery and installation

## Certifications and Standards

- SR3 Security Rated (BS EN 1627:2011) — highest residential security rating
- PAS 24:2022 Certified — enhanced security performance standard
- Secured by Design Approved — official UK police security initiative
- ISO 9001 Certified — quality management system
- FD30/FD60 Fire Rated — certified to BS 476-22
- Approved Document Q Compliant — for new builds and conversions
- Approved Document B Compliant — fire safety in residential buildings

## Areas Served

SteelR provides nationwide installation across the United Kingdom, with particular focus on:

- **London** — Kensington, Chelsea, Hampstead, Richmond, Wimbledon, Chiswick, Fulham, Notting Hill, Holland Park, Putney, Dulwich, Barnes, Highgate, Muswell Hill, Ealing
- **Buckinghamshire** — Beaconsfield, Gerrards Cross, Amersham, Marlow, Chalfont St Giles, Chalfont St Peter
- **Surrey** — Virginia Water, Weybridge, Esher, Cobham, Woking, Guildford, Leatherhead
- **Kent** — Sevenoaks, Tunbridge Wells, Canterbury, Bromley
- **Essex** — Chelmsford, Brentwood, Loughton
- **Berkshire** — Windsor, Ascot, Sunningdale, Maidenhead, Reading
- **Oxfordshire** — Oxford, Henley-on-Thames, Thame
- **Hampshire** — Winchester, Farnham, Fleet
- **Hertfordshire** — St Albans, Harpenden, Northwood, Chorleywood, Rickmansworth
- **Cheshire** — Alderley Edge, Knutsford, Wilmslow, Prestbury
- **West Midlands** — Solihull, Sutton Coldfield, Edgbaston
- **West Yorkshire** — Harrogate, Ilkley, Wetherby

## Pricing

SteelR doors are bespoke and individually priced based on specification. There are no fixed prices. A detailed specification and estimate is provided after the initial design consultation and property survey. Request a free consultation to discuss your project.

## How to Contact SteelR

- Phone: 0800 861 1450 (Monday–Saturday, 9am–5pm)
- Email: info@steelr.co.uk
- Website: https://steelr.co.uk
- Design and estimate tool: https://steelr.co.uk/design-estimate
- Door collection gallery: https://steelr.co.uk/collection
